name: China Wuyi Co., Ltd.
summary: China Wuyi Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate investment and development activities. It also provides real estate property management services; domestic and international project contracting and investment services; capital operation and financing, and build-operate-transfer services; high-tech development and co-operation; decorating and finishing; and technology and labor service cooperation, etc. In addition, the company is involved in the trading, import, and export of construction materials and equipment; provision of construction, engineering, and general contracting services for house-building and decoration projects; and construction of public infrastructure projects, such as roads and bridges, airports, hospitals, conference centers, and municipal buildings. It has operations in Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and African markets. The company is based in Fuzhou, China.
